name: Dire Wolf
special_abilities: [{"name":"Keen Hearing and Smell","desc":"The wolf has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell."},{"name":"Pack Tactics","desc":"The wolf has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated."}]
actions: [{"name":"Bite","desc":"Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone."}]
